title: Mob Creepers
description: Many mobs are now turned into creepers.
body:
**THIS ADDON IS CURRENLY IN IT'S TESTING PHASE.**
Currently, this mod supports Minecraft 1.21.4 (NeoForge 21.4.137).

Have you ever wanted to bring back the pig creeper and have zombified piglin creepers? With this addon for Minecraft Java, you can! Mob Creepers by WorldStudios add 3 creepers (with more to come) to the game!

Due to MCreator's limitations, I can only use NeoForge as the loader for this addon, so I'm sorry if you don't use NeoForge.
